data.title: Ouma Health and Valley Healthcare collaborate in telemidwifery to restore local maternity care. - 139 characters
data.description: In Columbus, Georgia, on January 20, 2026, Ouma Health, the country's sole comprehensive maternity telehealth platform established and managed by Maternal-Fetal Medicine (MFM) experts, revealed a significant collaboration with Valley Healthcare. This partnership aims to safeguard and enhance maternity services.

data.title: GreenCore Solutions launches TreeFree diapers, resolving ESG goals through AI-consumable EU-ECO-10060, in multiple EU cities.
data.description: Zero Tree brand diapers have successfully addressed Green Claims, CSRD, and EUDR regulations, ensuring compliance in AI-enabled ERP procurement. This development was announced in Toronto, Paris, Frankfurt, Barcelona, Milan, and Warsaw on January 20, 2026.

data.title: Government of Bermuda showcases leadership in digital infrastructure by uploading public datasets to Filecoin network in Davos, Switzerland on Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: Bermuda is establishing itself as a key player in the digital public infrastructure realm, showcasing the potential of verifiable, decentralized public data. Spearheaded by the Ministry for the Cabinet Office and Digital Innovation, Bermuda's efforts were highlighted in Davos, Switzerland on January 20, 2026. The initiative underscores Bermuda's ambition to lead globally in this sector and promote the use of secure and accessible digital systems.

data.title: Hyperscale Data has 545.4218 Bitcoin in treasury, aiming for $100 million; NYSE: GPUS.
data.description: Hyperscale Data, Inc. (NYSE American: GPUS) based in Las Vegas, revealed its ongoing objective to reach a Bitcoin treasury of $100 million. The company, specializing in artificial intelligence (AI) data centers and prominently utilizing Bitcoin, shared this information in a recent announcement. As of Jan. 20, 2026, the firm remains focused on this substantial financial goal as it progresses within the industry.

data.title: FDA grants clearance to VitaSmart™ HOPE System by Bridge to Life™ for hypothermic oxygenated perfusion of donor livers, supports various donors.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Bridge to Life™ Ltd. announced that VitaSmart™ has received FDA clearance for its labeling, enhancing its clinical versatility for Donation after Circulatory Death (DCD) donors. The labeling also positions VitaSmart™ as a cost-effective and scalable solution for transplant centers in the United States. This development marks a significant advancement in the transplant field, with potential economic benefits and expanded opportunities for utilizing VitaSmart™ in various clinical settings.

data.title: Wesco (NYSE: WCC) to hold Q4 & full year 2025 earnings call on Feb 10, 10AM ET. Live webcast available.
data.description: In Pittsburgh, Wesco International (NYSE: WCC) has scheduled its earnings conference call for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 10, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET. To participate, dial-in information is provided. The live audio webcast for the earnings presentation is available at [specific web address].

data.title: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. announces availability of Synchrony™ S1 Prefillable Syringe System at Pharmapack on Jan. 20, 2026. Leadership in drug delivery solutions highlighted. $WST (NYSE) mentioned.
data.description: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc., a global leader in innovative injectable drug administration solutions, recently highlighted their leadership in drug delivery solutions and combination products during a presentation in EXTON, Pennsylvania on January 20, 2026. The company, listed on the NYSE as WST, showcased their expertise in this field during the event.

data.title: AHF's activism celebrated through augmented reality and art at 2-night exhibition in Hollywood on January 20-21.
data.description: Los Angeles is hosting a special art exhibition titled "Bloom: Celebrating AHF’s Activism Through Augmented Reality and Art" for 2 nights only in Hollywood on January 20 and 21. This event will showcase a unique blend of augmented reality and art, highlighting the activism of AHF.

data.title: i-80 Gold reports high-grade assay results from Granite Creek Underground Project, reinforcing resource expansion potential. TSX:IAU, NYSE:IAUX.
data.description: i-80 Gold Corporation (TSX: IAU, NYSE American: IAUX) based in Toronto reported assay results from the 2025 drilling program at the Granite Creek Underground Project. The company expressed satisfaction with the findings, marking a significant development in the Project.

data.title: CareVet introduces Clinical Outcomes Showcase to boost patient care; Chief Vet Officer Dr. Kent Thornberry explains improvements.
data.description: Dr. Kent Thornberry, the Chief Veterinary Officer at CareVet, recently spoke about the enhanced outcomes being seen in veterinary medicine. This comes as the industry is experiencing rapid evolution due to a rise in case complexity and heightened expectations from both clients and care teams. CareVet is at the forefront of these advancements, with Dr. Thornberry sharing insights on this matter in St. Louis on January 20, 2026.

data.title: GSK acquiring RAPT Therapeutics for $2.2 billion to advance food allergy breakthrough with long-acting anti-IgE therapy.
data.description: GSK plc (NYSE: GSK) announced its acquisition of RAPT Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: RAPT) for $58.00 per share, totaling an estimated $2.2 billion in equity value. After accounting for cash, GSK's upfront investment is approximately $1.9 billion. RAPT Therapeutics, a California-based biopharmaceutical company, focuses on therapies for inflammatory and immunologic diseases. The acquisition includes ozureprubart, an anti-IgE monoclonal antibody in phase 2b development for protection against food allergens. IgE plays a critical role in allergic reactions, causing 94% of severe food allergies. The current treatment involves injections every 2 to 4 weeks, but ozureprubart offers a potentially more convenient option.
